sections.description: Synchronizes clinic and doctor data from the PR360 API into WordPress clinic and doctor post types used by the 360 medical site network.
sections.installation:
1. Upload the plugin folder to /wp-content/plugins/360-api-sync/ or install via Plugins → Add New → Upload Plugin.
  2. Activate the plugin.
  3. Open 360 API Sync → Settings, configure API fields, and run manual sync.
sections.changelog:
1.4.2

  • Fixed image importer extension handling to preserve .svg files instead of forcing unsupported URLs to .jpg.
  • Added MIME fallback mapping so SVG imports are saved with image/svg+xml when needed.

1.4.1

  • Removed the Enable Mock API and Dry Run Mode settings from admin to keep live behavior consistent.
  • Forced runtime settings to keep both mock and dry-run disabled.

1.4.0

  • Switched to a manifest-based GitHub updater (main branch ZIP) to match the 360 blocks updater pattern.
  • Added in-plugin updater integration that provides plugin information and update responses from plugin-manifest.json.
  • Added package-folder rename handling during update to preserve the 360-api-sync plugin directory.
